name: Lottielab
description: Web-based Lottie animation editor for designers to create, edit, and ship interactive animations to apps and websites without coding. Trusted by 500,000+ designers.

seo.title: Lottielab — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Lottielab: Web-based Lottie animation editor for designers to create, edit, and ship interactive animations to apps and websites without coding. Trusted by 500,

when_to_use: Interactive button animation created without After Effects
SVG illustration animated and exported as Lottie for web app
Micro-interaction polished in browser-based Lottie editor
Animation handed off to developer with embed code snippet
State-based animation built for loading, success, and error states

pros: Web-native editor removes the After Effects dependency
Interactive animation support targets real product use cases
Faster learning curve than AE + Bodymovin workflow
cons: Advanced motion features still trail After Effects
Subscription required for team and export features
Newer company; long-term roadmap less certain
review.verdict: Best-in-class for designers who want to ship Lottie animations without learning After Effects — a real LottieFiles alternative.
review.best_for: Product designers creating interactive Lottie animations without motion-design expertise.
review.not_for: Motion designers doing complex cinematic work or teams committed to LottieFiles marketplace.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
